coverageRows.assuranceRationale: full assurance is possible where all in-scope log sources are onboarded and Splunk is the evidence system for monitoring, retention, and log integrity checks.
coverageRows.bestInClassRationale: Logging and monitoring is a direct Splunk strength: the row ties official-source requirements to source inventory, coverage, detection, retention, and evidence integrity rather than prose-only attestations.
coverageRows.evidenceArtifact: NIS2 monitoring and logging dashboard, log-source inventory lookup, scheduled log coverage report, and archived log integrity export in `index=audit_evidence`.
coverageRows.legalDisclaimer: Monitoring evidence only; not a legal compliance certification.
coverageRows.obligation: Monitoring and logging controls: log-source inventory, logging coverage, event detection, near misses, anomaly and denial-of-service detection, log review, log integrity, and retention.
coverageRows.splunkCanDo: Maintain log-source inventory, measure coverage, detect anomalies, retain events, and produce evidence of log integrity and review using Splunk searches and dashboards.
coverageRows.splunkCannotDo: Splunk cannot approve the logging policy, decide legal retention periods, or prove sources that are not onboarded or integrity-protected.

coverageTaxonomy.contributing: Splunk provides useful context or supporting records, not the primary control.
coverageTaxonomy.direct: Splunk can directly produce operational evidence from machine data or workflow records.
coverageTaxonomy.not-monitorable: The obligation is legal, state, authority, or regulator-side; Splunk keeps references, tasks, and evidence boundaries only.
coverageTaxonomy.partial: Splunk evidences a meaningful part of the obligation; policy/process/legal completion remains outside Splunk.

reviewConfidenceDefinitions.guidance-supported: Mapping is supported by ENISA or national guidance.
reviewConfidenceDefinitions.official-text-clear: Official source clearly states the requirement and Splunk boundary is straightforward.
reviewConfidenceDefinitions.requires-legal-review: Needs national-law or counsel interpretation before any compliance claim.
